narrative:
Reyns 3-B (precinct in Franklin County) has 437 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.5 percentage points.
